shell.partnerViewBlurb: Same screens as a venue owner. Billing and Stripe stay under Organizations.
shell.streamlinedOnboardingLead: Finish setup to open your dashboard

trialBar.trialEndedTail: Subscribe to restore partner editing and venue play. Manage your plan and invoices in one place.
trialBar.activeTail: One location included — upgrade to add more.

partnerOnboarding.accessGrantedBody: An administrator added you to a venue, or another step completed your access. You do not need to finish this setup wizard. Taking you to your venues…

partnerAnalytics.pageLead: Compare roll-up performance across all locations in an organization, or focus on a single venue. Date filters use UTC unless a venue timezone is shown.
partnerAnalytics.noAccessTitle: Analytics require owner or manager access
partnerAnalytics.noAccessBody: Your account is on the team in a staff role. Ask an owner or manager if you need organization or venue statistics.
partnerAnalytics.rangeHint: Custom from/to overrides the rolling window when both are set (UTC dates).
partnerAnalytics.openVenueDashboard: Open full venue dashboard (exports, campaigns, staff) →
partnerAnalytics.noVenuesInOrg: No venues are linked to this organization yet.

partnerSubscriptions.title: Subscriptions & billing
partnerSubscriptions.lead: Platform billing is per organization. Start your subscription inside this portal with Stripe Payment Element, then manage invoices and payment methods from Stripe customer portal.
partnerSubscriptions.stepCheckout: Use “Subscribe in this app” to complete card setup without leaving the portal (Stripe Elements).
partnerSubscriptions.stepPortal: After billing is active, use “Open Stripe customer portal” for invoices, payment methods, and plan changes.
partnerSubscriptions.stripeExplainer: Invoices, payment history, and plan changes are handled in Stripe’s secure customer portal. We do not store full card numbers in Cafe Social.
partnerSubscriptions.noOrgs: None of your venues are linked to an organization yet. Once they are, subscription and trial status will appear here.
partnerSubscriptions.subscribeHint: Requires STRIPE_PARTNER_PRICE_ID on the server and STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY for in-app pay. Optional NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PARTNER_PRICE_ID in this app overrides the price.
partnerSubscriptions.askOwner: Only owners and managers can open the billing portal for this organization.
partnerSubscriptions.billingSuccess: Payment completed — Stripe is syncing your subscription. Refresh if status does not update within a minute.
partnerSubscriptions.billingCancel: Checkout was cancelled. No charges were made.

partnerSubscriptionPay.title: Payment details
partnerSubscriptionPay.lead: Card fields are provided by Stripe (PCI scope minimized). After you pay, webhooks update your organization’s billing status.
partnerSubscriptionPay.missingOrg: Missing organization. Go back and pick an organization from Subscriptions & billing.
partnerSubscriptionPay.loadError: Could not start payment. Return to subscriptions and try again.
partnerSubscriptionPay.noPaymentStep: No card step was required — your subscription may already be active. Redirecting…
partnerSubscriptionPay.unexpectedNoSecret: Could not load a payment form. Please try hosted checkout from the subscriptions page or contact support.

picker.title: Act as customer
picker.label: Venue (owner experience, no billing links)
picker.hint: Partner screens respect locks and trial like the real owner. Subscription / Stripe / org billing are only on the organization detail page — not while acting here.

platform.title: Platform overview
platform.leadTail: for per-location content. To reproduce a partner experience, use
platform.leadEnd: in the sidebar. Financial work stays on the org detail page (Stripe), not in partner view.
platform.metricOrgsHint: Billing and roll-up units (single- or multi-location). Every venue should belong to one.
platform.metricVenuesHint: Physical locations; multi-location orgs share roll-up stats while each venue stays distinct.
platform.metricLockedHint: Often trial ended or billing pause — check the org.
platform.metricCanceledHint: Platform billing ended or churned for that organization.
platform.metricVenuesNoOrgHint: Assign under Organizations so billing and roll-ups apply.
platform.layoutExplainer: An organization is the same kind of entity either way: “single” vs “multi” only changes how we classify it, trial limits, and roll-up analytics when players visit different sites under one org.
platform.layoutFootnote: Player activity still attaches to the venue they are at; for multi-location orgs, analytics can also roll up across all venues in that organization.

organizations.gateBody: Organizations and billing are managed from the platform admin account.
organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Org → venue hierarchy: every venue should sit under an organization. Open a row for billing, Stripe, and venue membership.
organizations.filtersHint: Search is debounced. Billing status matches the API filter substring.

venues.title: Venues (CMS)
venues.subtitleSuper: Every physical location. Open a row for content, geofence, offers, perks, and staff.
venues.subtitlePartner: Locations where you are owner or manager.
venues.filterCountriesHint: Venue must match one of the selected ISO countries (empty = all).

staffRedemptions.title: Redeem code verification
staffRedemptions.leadStart: Signed in with a staff account. Match the guest's
staffRedemptions.leadEnd: after redeeming; it must appear on this UTC day list before you hand over the perk.
staffRedemptions.dashboardHint: for this venue to review moderation reports, appeals, and bans (requires MANAGER or OWNER role).
staffRedemptions.emptyDay: No redemption records for this day.
